_meta.description: Combined Home dashboard — indoor AQM, outdoor weather, stocks, system health
changelog: 2026-04-05 — Initial creation with 6 rows: at-a-glance, stocks, temp overlay, AQ+wind, SPY chart, system health
2026-04-05 — Add intraday prices, market sentiment, and sentiment heatmap rows
2026-04-07 — Add cross-asset correlation and regime z-score panels
2026-04-08 — Add paper trading row: portfolio stats, value chart, recent trades
2026-04-08 — Add Strategy C (no SIGNAL_A) and Strategy E (trailing stops) to A/B comparison panels
2026-04-08 — Add NWS Wind stat panel to At a Glance row
2026-04-08 — Add EPA PM2.5 stat panel to At a Glance row, reorganize widths to fit 8 panels

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, temp_f AS value FROM readings ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, humidity AS value FROM readings ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, tempf AS value FROM outdoor ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, humidity AS value FROM outdoor ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, pm25 AS value FROM readings ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, windspeedmph AS value FROM outdoor ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, wind_speed_mph AS value FROM nws_weather ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, pm25_aqi AS value FROM epa_air_quality ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, close AS value FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'SPY' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 90
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, close AS value FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'QQQ' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 90
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, close AS value FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'NVDA' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 90
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, close AS value FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'AAPL' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 90
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, close AS value FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'MSFT' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 90
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, close AS value FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'BTC-USD' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 90
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, price AS "SPY" FROM intraday WHERE ticker = 'SPY' AND ts >= date('now') ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, price AS "QQQ" FROM intraday WHERE ticker = 'QQQ' AND ts >= date('now') ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, price AS "NVDA" FROM intraday WHERE ticker = 'NVDA' AND ts >= date('now') ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, avg_1h AS "SPY" FROM sentiment_agg WHERE ticker = 'SPY' ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, avg_1h AS "QQQ" FROM sentiment_agg WHERE ticker = 'QQQ' ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, avg_1h AS "NVDA" FROM sentiment_agg WHERE ticker = 'NVDA' ORDER BY ts

SELECT ticker AS "Ticker", avg_1h AS "1hr Avg", avg_4h AS "4hr Avg", avg_24h AS "24hr Avg", article_count_24h AS "Articles (24h)" FROM sentiment_agg WHERE ts = (SELECT MAX(ts) FROM sentiment_agg) ORDER BY ticker
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, temp_f AS "Indoor Temp" FROM readings ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, tempf AS "Outdoor Temp" FROM outdoor ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, pm1 AS "PM1", pm25 AS "PM2.5", pm10 AS "PM10" FROM readings ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, windspeedmph AS "Wind (mph)", dailyrainin AS "Daily Rain (in)" FROM outdoor ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, close AS "Close", sma_20 AS "SMA 20", sma_50 AS "SMA 50", sma_200 AS "SMA 200" FROM ohlcv WHERE ticker = 'SPY' ORDER BY date
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, corr_20 AS "SPY/TLT" FROM correlations WHERE pair = 'SPY/TLT' ORDER BY date
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, corr_20 AS "SPY/GLD" FROM correlations WHERE pair = 'SPY/GLD' ORDER BY date
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, corr_20 AS "SPY/BTC-USD" FROM correlations WHERE pair = 'SPY/BTC-USD' ORDER BY date
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, z_score AS "SPY/TLT" FROM regime_signals WHERE pair = 'SPY/TLT' ORDER BY date
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, z_score AS "SPY/GLD" FROM regime_signals WHERE pair = 'SPY/GLD' ORDER BY date
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, z_score AS "NVDA/QQQ" FROM regime_signals WHERE pair = 'NVDA/QQQ' ORDER BY date
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, total_value AS value FROM portfolio_state ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, cash AS value FROM portfolio_state ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, total_pnl AS value FROM portfolio_state ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, CASE WHEN (win_count + loss_count) > 0 THEN CAST(win_count AS REAL) / (win_count + loss_count) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS value FROM portfolio_state ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, open_positions AS value FROM portfolio_state ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, total_trades AS value FROM portfolio_state ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT MAX(pnl) AS value FROM trades WHERE action = 'SELL'
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, total_value AS value FROM portfolio_state WHERE ts >= datetime('now', '-7 days') ORDER BY ts
SELECT ticker, action, price, signal, pnl, pnl_pct, ts FROM trades ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, cpu_temp_c AS value FROM readings ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, cpu_load AS value FROM readings ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, mem_free_mb AS value FROM readings ORDER BY ts
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, uptime_s AS value FROM readings ORDER BY ts
